name: Unreal World
short_description: A hanging up game for material collection and value enhancement
detailed_description:
The Unreal World is a casual game that can be used to collect items and increase numerical value. The game is equipped with a hang up and synthesis system, and you can choose to collect items yourself or hang up to collect them
Game objective
Improve your attributes and enter different stages of the map to collect all items in the game and synthesize the final clearance items, or continuously improve your attributes to obtain a higher numerical experience
Game content
There are over 200 items, over 40 types of wild monsters and plants, and over 30 types of minerals for you to explore in the game.
Game Map
The map is divided into seven stages, each with unique monsters and plants belonging to this stage, and there are also four special maps that can obtain extremely rare items
About Hanging Up
There are two ways to play the game, you can manually operate it or hang it up. The hang up system has detailed hang up settings, and you can set the hang up settings according to your own needs to maximize the benefits of manual operation
